biography.text: Nabila Taqiyyah is a rising star from Aceh whose beautiful voice and emotive songwriting have captivated millions across Indonesia. Known for her delicate yet powerful vocal tone and wide vocal range, Nabila has quickly built a loyal fanbase, Thenablovers, drawn to the sincerity and depth she brings to every performance. Born in 2004, Nabila began turning heads with early hits like the heartbreak anthem “Ku Ingin Pisah” and the emotionally charged “Terluka,” establishing herself as a distinctive voice in Indonesia’s new generation of pop ballad artists. In 2025, she released her highly anticipated debut album, Kekal Yang Sementara, a soul-baring collection of songs that explores themes of loss, resilience, and fleeting love. The album’s standout single, “Berjalan Tanpamu,” became an instant hit, further cementing her reputation as a storyteller with sensitivity and strength. With her songwriting debut, “Hanya Lolongan,” already proving her lyrical depth, Nabila Taqiyyah is not just a singer — she’s a voice for those learning to heal.
